assets.title: Care existed. Love existed. The money did not.
assets.description: A core-line graphic explaining the heart of The Waiting Room Stories Project.
assets.alt_text: The Waiting Room Stories Project graphic with Chilli in a flower hat and the words Care existed. Love existed. The money did not.
assets.caption:
Care existed. Love existed. The money did not.

The Waiting Room Stories Project is collecting real owner stories about emergency and specialist vet care becoming unreachable because of cost, insurance limits, upfront payment, or lack of fast support.

Share or read more: https://waitingroom.kingchillithepug.com/

assets.title: Emergency care can be out of reach
assets.description: A shareable graphic about emergency and specialist vet care existing but still being unreachable.
assets.alt_text: The Waiting Room Stories Project graphic with Chilli in a flower hat and the words Emergency and specialist vet care can exist and still be out of reach.
assets.caption:
Emergency and specialist vet care can exist and still be out of reach.

The Waiting Room Stories Project is gathering owner stories to show where cost, insurance limits, upfront payment, and lack of fast support leave families with impossible choices.

https://waitingroom.kingchillithepug.com/

assets.title: Share your emergency vet care story
assets.description: A direct invitation for people to share an emergency or specialist vet care access story.
assets.alt_text: The Waiting Room Stories Project graphic with Chilli in a flower hat and the words Share your emergency vet care story.
assets.caption:
If emergency or specialist vet care became unreachable because of cost, insurance limits, upfront payment, reimbursement delays, or lack of fast support, your story can help.

Share your story with The Waiting Room Stories Project: https://waitingroom.kingchillithepug.com/share.html

assets.title: Share your story
assets.description: A second approved share-story graphic with the same invitation in a softer layout.
assets.alt_text: The Waiting Room Stories Project graphic with Chilli on a cushion in a flower hat and the words Share your emergency vet care story.
assets.caption:
A few sentences can help show what happens when care is possible but payment, insurance, or timing puts it out of reach.

Share your emergency vet care story: https://waitingroom.kingchillithepug.com/share.html
